productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Casual Brown Lifestyle Shoe
description: CompositionBrown shoes made of perforated leather upper, phylon midsole and carbon rubber outsole.shoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washTalk about style and comfort and there's nothing better than this pair of footwear from skechers. The perforated nubuck upper ensures your feet are well ventilated, while the upper and heel are stylishly held together with navy blue and white striped elastic bands. The pair has a short elastic below the tongue that makes it easy to wear and take off the shoe, while the soft fabric shoeliner ensures the shoe stays firm and snug around the feet. The cushioned insole and lightweight midsole with shock absorbing technology protects your feet from impact on hard surfaces. The high traction flexible outsole supports your natural body movement and walking posture, while the carbon rubber outsole keeps the shoe flexible, weather-resistant and easy to maintain through all seasons.
